pi_items.source: HL7 message 1 PID.3.1 field (Patient ID) extracted from setup_task.sh line 14
HL7 message 1 MSH.9.2 field (Trigger Event Code) per HL7 v2.5.1 standard; extracted from setup_task.sh line 12
HL7 message 2 PID.3.1 field (Patient ID) extracted from setup_task.sh line 23
HL7 message 2 MSH.9.2 field (Trigger Event Code) per HL7 v2.5.1 standard; extracted from setup_task.sh line 21

privileged_info_summary: The task creates synthetic HL7 v2.5.1 test messages embedded in setup_task.sh. Message 1 (ADT^A01) contains patient MRN78432 (JOHNSON^ROBERT^T) with trigger event A01. Message 2 (ADT^A04) contains patient MRN91205 (MARTINEZ^ELENA^M) with trigger event A04. These test messages are used to verify that NextGen Connect correctly extracts the three required metadata columns (PatientMRN from PID.3.1, PatientName from PID.5, and EventType from MSH.9.2) and sends messages to a TCP listener on port 6661.
